## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to initiate collaboration between Egnyte and GrowthX, focusing on AEC expert resource for Copilot development.](https://fathom.video/share/y4KoNsvNxLd1Dy_kgNiX3_--CDvrW5Eg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Nadia Hamade, with 20+ years of construction industry experience, will provide AEC expertise to enhance Egnyte's product offerings.](https://fathom.video/share/y4KoNsvNxLd1Dy_kgNiX3_--CDvrW5Eg?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Key focus areas: product demo, use case mapping, AI integration for document analysis, and building code/regulation integration.](https://fathom.video/share/y4KoNsvNxLd1Dy_kgNiX3_--CDvrW5Eg?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [Immediate next steps include sharing RFP packages, setting up an Egnyte account for Nadia, and scheduling an on-site visit.](https://fathom.video/share/y4KoNsvNxLd1Dy_kgNiX3_--CDvrW5Eg?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)

## Topics

### Nadia's Background and Expertise

  - [20+ years in construction, progressing from engineering to project management and sales](https://fathom.video/share/y4KoNsvNxLd1Dy_kgNiX3_--CDvrW5Eg?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Extensive experience with project documents, specifications, bids, and proposals](https://fathom.video/share/y4KoNsvNxLd1Dy_kgNiX3_--CDvrW5Eg?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Currently consulting part-time while focusing on family](https://fathom.video/share/y4KoNsvNxLd1Dy_kgNiX3_--CDvrW5Eg?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)

### Egnyte Product Introduction and Use Case Mapping

  - [Plan to conduct a comprehensive product demo for Nadia](https://fathom.video/share/y4KoNsvNxLd1Dy_kgNiX3_--CDvrW5Eg?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Nadia to provide an A-to-Z overview of project lifecycle from conception to completion](https://fathom.video/share/y4KoNsvNxLd1Dy_kgNiX3_--CDvrW5Eg?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Goal: Align Egnyte's capabilities with real-world AEC workflows and pain points](https://fathom.video/share/y4KoNsvNxLd1Dy_kgNiX3_--CDvrW5Eg?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Focus on connecting features to daily tasks of job site workers and project managers](https://fathom.video/share/y4KoNsvNxLd1Dy_kgNiX3_--CDvrW5Eg?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)

### Document Management and AI Integration

  - [Egnyte stores all project documents, including financial and accounting information](https://fathom.video/share/y4KoNsvNxLd1Dy_kgNiX3_--CDvrW5Eg?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Opportunity to use AI for sorting, categorizing, and processing billing/accounting data](https://fathom.video/share/y4KoNsvNxLd1Dy_kgNiX3_--CDvrW5Eg?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Nadia to upload sample project files to a demo Egnyte account for hands-on exploration](https://fathom.video/share/y4KoNsvNxLd1Dy_kgNiX3_--CDvrW5Eg?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [Specific focus on RFP to proposal conversion workflow](https://fathom.video/share/y4KoNsvNxLd1Dy_kgNiX3_--CDvrW5Eg?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### Change Management and Document Comparison

  - [Identified as a major pain point in construction projects](https://fathom.video/share/y4KoNsvNxLd1Dy_kgNiX3_--CDvrW5Eg?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [Need for AI-powered comparison between old and new document sets (drawings, specs)](https://fathom.video/share/y4KoNsvNxLd1Dy_kgNiX3_--CDvrW5Eg?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
  - [Goal: Automatically highlight and outline all changes to save time and reduce errors](https://fathom.video/share/y4KoNsvNxLd1Dy_kgNiX3_--CDvrW5Eg?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)

### Building Codes and Regulations Integration

  - [Explore ways to incorporate building codes and safety regulations into Egnyte](https://fathom.video/share/y4KoNsvNxLd1Dy_kgNiX3_--CDvrW5Eg?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [Two potential approaches:](https://fathom.video/share/y4KoNsvNxLd1Dy_kgNiX3_--CDvrW5Eg?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
    1.  Egnyte purchases and maintains a library of codes (resource-intensive)
    2.  Allow customers to upload their own purchased codes for AI-powered interpretation
  - [Need to determine optimal workflow for code reference and interpretation](https://fathom.video/share/y4KoNsvNxLd1Dy_kgNiX3_--CDvrW5Eg?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)

### Existing Tools and Beta Programs

  - [Smart Specs tool: Nadia to review and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/y4KoNsvNxLd1Dy_kgNiX3_--CDvrW5Eg?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
  - [Contracts Analyzer beta program: Potential to refocus on AEC-specific needs](https://fathom.video/share/y4KoNsvNxLd1Dy_kgNiX3_--CDvrW5Eg?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nadia to create an Egnyte account using the construction.ignite.com link](https://fathom.video/share/y4KoNsvNxLd1Dy_kgNiX3_--CDvrW5Eg?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
  - [Hari to send Nadia a link to the Specs Analyzer tool for review](https://fathom.video/share/y4KoNsvNxLd1Dy_kgNiX3_--CDvrW5Eg?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
  - [Nadia to share sample RFP packages and corresponding proposals](https://fathom.video/share/y4KoNsvNxLd1Dy_kgNiX3_--CDvrW5Eg?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [On-site visit scheduled for Monday, October 7th, from 11:30 AM to 2:00 PM](https://fathom.video/share/y4KoNsvNxLd1Dy_kgNiX3_--CDvrW5Eg?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
  - [Team to set up an external Slack channel for direct communication with Nadia](https://fathom.video/share/y4KoNsvNxLd1Dy_kgNiX3_--CDvrW5Eg?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
  - [Egnyte team to prepare for deep-dive discussions on product features and AEC workflows](https://fathom.video/share/y4KoNsvNxLd1Dy_kgNiX3_--CDvrW5Eg?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)
